auth.joinNextGen: Join the next generation of professional editors.

verification.fillDetails: Fill in your professional details to start teaching.
verification.almostThere: Almost there! Complete your registration fee to unlock student inquiries.
verification.photoHint: JPG, PNG or GIF. Max size 5MB.
verification.uploadVideoDesc: Upload a short video (max 3 minutes) introducing yourself and your teaching philosophy.
verification.chanceToShine: This is your chance to shine and show students your personality!
verification.videoHint: MP4, MOV or AVI. Max size 100MB.
verification.aboutPlaceholder: Briefly describe your background and passion for teaching...
verification.techniquesPlaceholder: Explain your methods (e.g., Socratic method, project-based learning...)
verification.unlockPower: Unlock the full power of SkillsUp
verification.regFeeDesc: Your one-time registration fee of 3000 XAF ensures we maintain a high-quality community of verified educators.
verification.prioritySearchDesc: Verified tutors appear 3x more often in student searches.
verification.unlimitedInquiriesDesc: Receive unlimited messages from parents and students without restrictions.
verification.verifiedBadgeDesc: Build instant trust with a professional verification badge on your profile.
verification.secureDesc: Your payment information is processed securely. We do not store your private mobile money credentials.
verification.momoPhoneHint: Enter the phone number associated with your mobile money account.
verification.promptInfo: You will receive a prompt on your phone to authorize the transaction.
verification.termsAgree: By clicking "Initiate Payment", you agree to SkillsUp's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. All fees are non-refundable.
verification.footer: © 2024 Faculty Recruitment Portal. All rights reserved.

landing.heroSubtitle: Connect with expert tutors for 1-on-1 home lessons tailored to your specific pace, schedule, and learning goals.
landing.searchPlaceholder: What do you want to learn?
landing.findExpertDesc: Browse thousands of verified tutors by experience, and proximity to your home.
landing.bookTeacherDesc: Schedule your children's study session to discuss goals and ensure it's the right fit.
landing.startLearningDesc: Help children begin personalized lesson plan from the comfort of your own living room.
landing.highlyQualified: Highly qualified professionals in your neighborhood
landing.elenaQuote: "12 years experience helping students achieve their top grades in competitive exams."
landing.jamesQuote: "Tailored approach to music that makes learning fun for kids and adults alike."
landing.sarahQuote: "Passionate about unlocking your unique voice through the written word."
landing.michaelQuote: "Making complex coding concepts simple through practical home projects."
landing.readyToStart: Ready to start your learning journey?
landing.joinThousands: Join thousands of students who have found their perfect mentor today.
landing.empoweringStudents: Empowering students through personalized home-based learning experiences. We believe the right teacher can change everything.
landing.copyright: © {{year}} SkillsUp Tutoring Ltd. All rights reserved.
